source: pred.gg simpleBuild perk statistics (gameModes RANKED), per hero-role with 100+ field games in our aggregates, plus every hero’s primary role
note: augment = the hero-specific perk locked in the first ~20s; winrates are observational evidence, not engine math; augment mechanical modeling is still open (priorities item 9)

12.name: Frozen Fury
12.description: Frost Storm grants 10-34% Attack Speed while active. Increases with Hero Level.

14.name: Atomised Artillery
14.description: Atomiser fires 3 blasts in succession, each dealing 60% of the original damage.

15.name: Plasma Barrage
15.description: Plasma Grenade reduces its own Cooldown by 3.5s when attaching to an Enemy Hero.

17.name: Bolster Bearicade
17.description: While Tesseract Core is active, gain 15% increased Armors.

18.name: Savage Shred
18.description: Detection Protocol's Mark Shreds 35% Physical Armor for 5s when consumed.

19.name: Apex Hunter
19.description: Chrono Swipe deals 70% more damage to Heroes below 20% Max Health.

20.name: Blood Well
20.description: Takedowns summon a pool of blood with 18 charges for 120s. While standing in the pool, Countess consumes a charge to restore 2% Max Health and 2.5% Max Mana every 0.25s.

21.name: Sanguine Slash
21.description: Blade Siphon deals 20% more damage to Isolated Targets.

23.name: Combo Crunch
23.description: Dealing damage with Cross Crunch grants 7.5% Total Attack Speed for 3s, stacking up to 4 times.

25.name: Falcon Crunch
25.description: Empowered Right Crunch deals 15% increased damage and launches Crunch 4x higher when used mid-air. Its Cooldown is 30% longer when this occurs.

28.name: Photon Efficiency
28.description: Photon Disruptor deals 10% more damage and its Cooldown is reduced by 15% when it hits a Hero.

29.name: Bring The Boom
29.description: Rad Rounds deals 60% of its damage to nearby Enemies upon exploding.

30.name: Shred Spree
30.description: Shrapnel Cannon's Cooldown is reduced by 85%, but it deals 60% less damage.

31.name: Smog Therapy
31.description: While standing in Gag Grenade, Yourself and Allied Heroes restore for 10/55/100/145/190 (+105%)(+120%) Health over its lifetime.

32.name: Mana Catalyst
32.description: Restore Mana equal to 10% of damage dealt to Heroes, reduced to 1.5% for Non-Heroes. Basic Attacks restore 2x more.

33.name: Arcane Engine
33.description: Dealing Ability Damage to Heroes grants you 1.75% Movement Speed for 1.5s, stacking infinitely - 0.15s CD.

34.name: Infinite Obliteration
34.description: Synaptic Obliterator's projectile now have infinite range, travel 25% faster, and Slow for 50% longer.

35.name: Imperial Duelist
35.description: Your Basic Attacks debuff Targets for 3s. Against debuffed Targets, deal 5% more damage and take 5% less damage.

36.name: Ichorous Glaive
36.description: Killing Enemy Units restores 4% of Missing Health, increased to 35% for Earth Shatter Executions.

37.name: Seismic Smash
37.description: Earth Shatter also Knocks Up Enemies and Stuns for a short duration.

38.name: Verdant Embrace
38.description: Untamed Growth also Heals Yourself and Allies for 30 (+24%) over its duration. Healing repeats on Explosion.

40.name: Natural Infusion
40.description: Damaging Heroes with Harvest Nettles grants 10 Ability Haste for 6s, stacking infinitely.

41.name: Instant Reload
41.description: GTFO now Executes Heroes that fall below 5% Max Health. When this occurs, GTFO may be re-cast for 8s.

42.name: Reboot.exe
42.description: Triggering Pulsefire reduces your Current Basic Ability Cooldowns by 10%, increased to 25% against Heroes.

43.name: System Restore
43.description: Blocking an Ability with Energy Shield restores 20 (+10%) Health and grants 20% Decaying Movement Speed over 2s.

44.name: Auto-Lock Amp
44.description: Seek and Destroy's homing speed is increased by 25%.

45.name: Blast Zone
45.description: Sticky Mine's explosion radius is increased by 35%. Enhancing a Mine on an Enemy Hero grants 3 additional FDA stacks.

47.name: Abyssal Mantle
47.description: Upon activating Black Hole, gain a 50 (+75%) Shield for 4s.

48.name: Event Horizon
48.description: Cosmic Rift deals an additional <HealthText>(+5% Target's Max Health)</> damage to Enemies in the center.

50.name: Tainted Oath
50.description: Sacred Oath applies 50% Blight to Enemies for 4.5s.

51.name: Imperial Soul
51.description: Stone Forged Soul deals 12% more damage and its radius is 20% larger.

52.name: Close Cut
52.description: Make Way deals 20% increased damage to the nearest Enemy Unit.

54.name: Lust For Blood
54.description: Heal for 5-11.3% of damage dealt to Enemies afflicted with Max Bloodlust stacks. Increases with Hero Level.

56.name: Blast Off!
56.description: Land Mine's cooldown is 12% lower and blasts Targets 30% further.

57.name: Combat Thrusters
57.description: Gain 40%/70%/130% Movement Speed during Make It Rain.

58.name: Sniper Shells
58.description: Howitzer's Basic Attacks grant him 4% Total Attack Speed and 1.5% Omnivamp for 4.5s, stacking up to 5 times.

59.name: Bringer Of Mercy
59.description: Mercy costs 10 less Mana and reduces Kira's Current Ability Cooldowns by 0.75s upon dealing damage.

60.name: Siphoning Purge
60.description: Purge Heals for 25% of its damage dealt to Heroes.

62.name: Badlands Belch
62.description: Belch deals an additional <HealthText>(+7/8.5/10% Target's Missing Health)</> damage and Knocks Back 30% further.

63.name: Hold This!
63.description: Molotov permanently gains +5 Explosion Damage against Heroes each time its Explosion hits one.

64.name: Turret Maniac
64.description: Increase your Maximum Number of Turrets to 4, but they have 20% less Health.

65.name: Critical Override
65.description: Kallari's Abilities can Critically Strike, but her Critical Damage is decreased by 35%.

66.name: Execution Mandate
66.description: Takedowns reduce Current Basic Ability Cooldowns by 40%.

67.name: Deadly Finesse
67.description: If Crippling Dagger hits a Hero or kills an Enemy Unit, reduce its Cooldown by 1.25s. Hero hits also restore 20 Mana.

69.name: Jungle Invasion
69.description: Based on Hero Level, gain 3-17 Physical Power while in the Jungle. Increases to 6-34 in the Enemy Jungle.

70.name: Lane Lurker
70.description: Ancestral Fury also grants Rage against Minions, but its Health Regen is reduced by 25%/15%/5%/0% (at level 1/6/11/16).

71.name: Heavenly Tactician
71.description: Fury of the Heavens' Cooldown is reduced by 20s and Kwang no longer retrieves his Heavenly Blade upon Recalling.

72.name: Aura of the Heavens
72.description: Gain 5% Omnivamp. Nearby Allied Heroes gain 4% Omnivamp.

73.name: Slayer of the Heavens
73.description: Strike of the Heavens deals 25% more damage and reduces Cooldowns by 25% more.

74.name: Flow State
74.description: Evade's Cooldown is 15% lower and its Cooldown resets on Takedown.

75.name: Master Of Spears
75.description: Spear Of Nyr's Cooldown is only 50% longer when thrown.

76.name: The Ascended
76.description: Gain <HealthText>+5 Health</> and <AttackDamageText>+1 Physical Power</> every minute.

77.name: Devastating Bombs
77.description: Void Bomb deals 15% more damage to Isolated Targets.

78.name: Pulsefire Rounds
78.description: Lt. Belica's Basic Attacks also deal (+10%)(+12%) Damage On-Hit.

79.name: Combat Veteran
79.description: Passively gain <EffectText>+0.1-3 Experience</> each second. Increases with Hero Level.

80.name: Cursed Infestation
80.description: Hive deals 12% more damage and has 10% increased range.

81.name: Ritual Of Death
81.description: Curse heals Morigesh for 70%/80%/90% of damage dealt. Takedowns also decrease Curse's Cooldown by 20s.

82.name: Spirit Shred
82.description: Morigesh's Basic Attacks Shred 3.5% Magical Armor for 4s, stacking up to 5 times.

83.name: Justice's Reach
83.description: Shots Fired now pierces units and has +250 additional range.

84.name: Sting Operation
84.description: Murdock gains 2 additional Max Static Trap Charges and Static Traps are 20% larger.

85.name: Martial Law
85.description: Long Arm Of The Law deals 12% more damage and grants <AbilityName>+50g</> on Hero Kill.

86.name: Circuit Reset
86.description: Upon Shielding a Hero with Alacrity, reduce their Current Ability Cooldowns by 1.5s.

87.name: Essence Nullifier
87.description: Serenity's Max Charge Damage also drains 10 <AbilityPowerText>(+3/4.5/6/7.5/9% Target's Current Mana)</> Mana, dealing it as true damage.

90.name: Percussive Tear
90.description: Each hit of Crash Bang Boom! Shreds 2.5% Armors for 3s.

92.name: Psychic Support
92.description: Essence Catalyst also restores your Linked Ally's Mana by <AbilityPowerText>(+12% Target's Missing Mana)</> over the duration.

93.name: Kindred Surge
93.description: Hyperflux grants 10% more Movement Speed and (+1.2% ) Health Regen for its duration.

94.name: Final Flash
94.description: Energy Lance is 30% shorter but deals 20/30/40/50/70% more damage.

95.name: Rock & Awe
95.description: Boulder Throw deals 0-100% more damage, based on distance thrown (capped at 6000 units).

96.name: The Rumbling
96.description: Rumble's Cooldown is refunded when it deals damage,  but it deals 35% less damage, costs 10 more Mana, and Slows Rampage by 60% while active.

97.name: Tiny Titan
97.description: Behemoth shrinks Rampage instead, granting him no Combat Penalty and 35/40/45% Total Attack Speed, but he receives 45% more damage.

98.name: Quickdraw
98.description: Revenant reloads 35% faster and jumps 25% higher.

99.name: Hellfire Blast
99.description: Helllfire Rounds' Fourth Shot deals 7% more damage and ignores 30% Bonus Physical Armor.

100.name: Spectral Bounty
100.description: Reckoning now grants 3x Bounty Hunter gold and 4 (+25% of stolen stats) Physical & Magical Power on Kill.

103.name: Wanton Warden
103.description: Regenerate Health equal to 4-7% of damage taken over 5s. Increases with Hero Level.

104.name: Crushing Descent
104.description: Ascend now Stuns for 0.2s when it deals damage.

105.name: Vital Resonance
105.description: Fallen Grace's Visages restore (+170%) Health on pick-up.

107.name: Gravebreaker
107.description: Colossal Blow's Knock Back is 15% stronger. Each Soul Tier increases this by 30% more.

108.name: Unholy Pursuit
108.description: Phantom Rush grants 2 Souls when it damages a Hero. Its Cooldown also resets when Colossal Blow hits a Hero.

109.name: Grim Harvest
109.description: Siphon now Executes Enemies that fall below 6% Max Health.

113.name: Endless Hunt
113.description: Takedowns reset Sparrow's Basic Ability Cooldowns and permanently grant 1 Physical Penetration.

115.name: Inner Fury
115.description: Inner Fire now releases a fan of 5 arrows, has 8% more range, and fires 2 more volleys.

116.name: Adaptive Force
116.description: Force Shield's Cooldown is 3s lower and now has 2 charges, but is reduced in size.

118.name: Colossal Crash
118.description: Shield Slam's has 10% longer range, its area of effect is 10% larger, and Knocks Back Enemies on impact instead.

119.name: Axe Retrieval
119.description: Highland Hurl can be picked up, reducing its Cooldown by 45%.

120.name: Iron Resolve
120.description: Wild Rush grants 25/27.5/30/32.5/35% Damage Reduction while it is Channeling.

121.name: Hersir's Will
121.description: While Unstoppable Force is active, gain a stack of Hersir every 0.6s.

122.name: Soul Weaver
122.description: Soul Storm grants 20% <EffectText>(+5% per Hero Hit)</> Damage Reduction while active, and its Cooldown is 8% lower.

123.name: Hallowed Reverberation
123.description: Hallowed Strikes gains 150 additional range and bounces 2 more times.

124.name: Ephemeral Surge
124.description: Destroying Torn Spirits restores 3% of your Maximum Mana and grants 35% Decaying Movement Speed over 2.5s.

126.name: Grenadier
126.description: Vortex Grenades has 1 additional Max Charge. Rocket Dash grants 1 charge on use.

129.name: Nightmare Extractor
129.description: Casting an Ability reduces the Cooldown of Extract by 20%.

130.name: Dreadful Roots
130.description: If Abduct hits Terrain, Mourn pulls himself towards it.

131.name: Mystic Marksman
131.description: Knock, Knock! deals Magical Damage instead.

132.name: Sniper's Bounty
132.description: Killing Blows from Knock Knock! grant <AbilityName>+6g</>, increased to <AbilityName>+40g</> for Heroes.

133.name: Illusionist
133.description: Surprise, Surprise! grants its effects to nearby Allied Heroes, but its Cooldown is 10% higher.

134.name: Prosperous Path
134.description:
Body Stance: Kills grant <AbilityName>+4g</>.
Spirit Stance: Kills restore <HealthText>+2.5% Missing Health</>.

135.name: Masterful Mimicry
135.description: Gain 1 more Max Clone and generate a stack of Hair every 5.5s.

136.name: From Up High
136.description: High Impact's Height Damage is no longer capped to 1500u, now dealing more damage at greater heights.

137.name: Energy Transfer
137.description: Deflecting a projectile grants 20% Decaying Movement Speed over 2s and a 44-350 Shield for 3s.

138.name: Storm of Salvation
138.description: Windburn lasts for 1s longer and grants <HealthText>(+0.75% Missing Health)</> Healing On-Hit while active. Healing is 20% effective against Non-Heroes.

139.name: Serpent's Blessing
139.description: Lash Kick's Cooldown is reduced by 50% when used on Terrain.

140.name: Disc Of Demise
140.description: Ricochet bounces 25% further and each hit reduces its Current Cooldown by 5%, increased to 10% for Heroes.

141.name: Heal Matrix
141.description: Infuse now has 2 charges but heals 15% less.

142.name: Terminal Treatment
142.description: Refibrillator's On-Hit damage increases by 0-50%, based on Target's Missing Health.

143.name: Netherward
143.description: Upon using Soulfire, gain a 40 (+40%) Shield for 2s.

144.name: Vital Essence
144.description: Picking up Essence grants <AbilityName>+4g</> and restores 3.5% Missing Health and Mana.

145.name: Communion
145.description: Mortal Coil no longer Executes but has 20% increased Radius. Ally Heroes now heal themselves upon damaging targets in its area, at 100% effectiveness.

146.name: Death From Above
146.description: Akeron can fire an additional web projectile from the wall or ground once, allowing him to leap from surface to surface or to Root from where he hangs.

147.name: Roar of Torment
147.description: Consume now Pushes instead of Pulls and deals 200% increased tick damage, but can no longer bite.

149.name: Frenzied Fighter
149.description: Berserk has no cooldown and can remain on indefinitely while under the Health threshold.

150.name: Betrayer's Reqiuem
150.description: Kingslayer uppercuts all Enemies in an area around the initial Target. Additionally, Kingslayer's Cooldown is reduced by 15%.

151.name: Swift Strikes
151.description: After casting an ability, Bayle gains 45% Attack Speed for one attack. Additionally, he automatically starts with the 3rd attack in his Basic Attack chain, but it always deals 20% decreased damage.

152.name: Focal Lens
152.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Tachyon Lance shreds their Physical Armor by 20% for 4s and reduces the cooldown by 1s.

153.name: Kinetic Waltz
153.description: Axiom Strike deals 90% damage, has 30% reduced cooldown and grants 35% movement speed for 1.5s when damaging Enemy Heroes.

154.name: Limit Break: Echo
154.description: After casting Limit Break, the cooldowns of your basic abilities in your current stance are instantly refreshed.

155.name: Ferocious Flight
155.description: For each Enemy hit by Maco Fly, Maco gains 30/50/70/90/110 (+10%)(+1.25%) additional Shielding and the ability's Cooldown is reduced by 1s. This effect also occurs on non-Heroes, but is reduced by 80%.

156.name: Longshot
156.description: Maco Sparkle's damage scales linearly based on how far it travels from 100% to 200% damage.

157.name: Shatterbloom
157.description: Maco Strike creates a Healing field at the explosion location that Heals 15/25/35 (+4%) every 0.25s for 5s.

158.name: Ghost in the Machine
158.description: After dashing with Erase Vector, become invisible for 1s.

159.name: Dox
159.description: Replace your trinket with Dox, granting you 5% increased Magical Power & 15% increased Maximum Mana. Activating it allows you to see nearby Enemy Heroes within 3000u for 4s.

160.name: RAM
160.description: Gain 5 Magical Power and 25% Base Mana Regen on takedown, stacking infinitely. At 3 stacks gain 5% Movement Speed. Upon death, lost 50% of stacks rounded up.

161.name: Lenore
161.description: Shadow Glide refreshes the cooldown of Nevermore and it deals (+30%) bonus Damage.

162.name: Nightstalker
162.description: Eclipse's bonus Movement Speed is increased to 70%/120%/200%.

163.name: War Anthem
163.description: Song Of My People and March no longer heal. Instead, they each grant +8/7.5/10/12.5/15% Physical Power while active.

164.name: Sun Shards
164.description: Sparrow's basic attacks ricochet 1/2/3/4 times, dealing (+20%) Damage and applying On-Hit effects at 35% effectiveness.

165.name: Crescendo
165.description: Shinbi’s final Basic Attack within her chain deals Magical Damage and 15 (+35%)(+30%) bonus damage.

166.name: Heavy Metal
166.description: Heavy Punches and Shield Bash deal Bonus Magical Damage On-Hit equal to 10% of your Total Physical Armor and Magical Armor.

167.name: Glacial Thorns
167.description: Glacial Charge spawns Hoarfrost Crystals at its base that deal 40/60/80/100/120 (+20%) Damage and Root for 0.5s.

168.name: Zap O' 9-Chains
168.description: On Ability Cast, Riktor’s next Basic Attack within 3s zaps 9 nearby Enemies, dealing 15 (+4 per Level)(+25% )(+30%) Damage.

169.name: Assault MK-II
169.description: Air Assault hovers for 0.5s longer and fires an additional missile with each attack.

170.name: Red Mist
170.description: Gain 10% Total Attack Speed per Enemy Hero or Camp Leader with Bloodlust applied within 1800 units.

171.name: Sacrosanct
171.description: Casting Reversal of Fortune on an Allied Hero immediately creates a Consecrated Ground at the current level at the target location.

172.name: Encore
172.description: If a Target dies while being damaged by All Kill, the Cooldown is reset.

173.name: Hypothermia
173.description: Damaging Enemy Heroes with Boreal Sweep shreds 15% Physical Armor and Magical Armor and slows Attack Speed by 20% for 3s.

174.name: Trapdoor Demon
174.description: Akeron becomes camouflaged when attaching to terrain, gaining 1.5% Max Health Regen and generating 8 Hunger per second while he remains there.

175.name: Eureka!
175.description: At 200 FDA stacks, gain a level. At 500 FDA stacks, gain +60% Jump Height.

176.name: Warden's Leash
176.description: Riplash now also hooks Allies, refunding 60% of its Cooldown and 60% of its Cost on Ally hit.

177.name: Shadow Echo
177.description: Repeat Shadow Slip's damage effect at your current location when swapping places with your Shadow.

178.name: Nothin' But Net
178.description: Stasis Bomb grants <GoldText>+25g</> and <AbilityPowerText>+2 Magical Power</> when it damages a Hero.

179.name: Polarity Strike
179.description: Ion Strike also grants a 200/350/500 (+50%)(+10% Target's Missing Health) Shield to Allied Heroes for 3.5s.

180.name: Spray 'N Pray
180.description: Ventilate deals 50% more damage, but has reduced accuracy at longer ranges.

181.name: Thonk
181.description: Thunk falls to the floor if it hits an Enemy. If Narbash picks it up he refunds 35% of its Cooldown and 50% of its Mana Cost.

182.name: Wrath Unleashed
182.description: Applying an On-Hit Effect to an Enemy Hero grants +0.75% Attack Speed for 3s, stacking infinitely.

184.name: Court of Roses
184.description: Iron Rose grants nearest Ally a 5s barrier with 15% Damage Reduction and attaches Thorned Vines to nearby Enemy Heroes dealing 50% damage.

186.name: Tyrant of Thorns
186.description:
Adele triggers Crown of Thorns at 300% effectiveness. 
Royal Flourish has 9/8.5/8/7.5/7 Cooldown and provides 50% Movement Speed, but no longer Mesmerizes.

193.name: Seeds of Dominion
193.description: Imperial Lash spawns a Thornbush under the dash target, reducing its Cooldown by 10%. Enemies are Slowed 10% and take 2/2.5/3/3.5/4 True Damage per 35u moved inside the Thornbush.

635.name: Press the Advantage
635.description: Upon achieving a Takedown, a Rally Point is spawned at the dead Targets location. Rally Point no longer grants Health Regeneration but increases Legions Rate of Fire by 12/18/22/26/30% and grants Allies 10/12.5/15/17.5/20% Attack Speed.

636.name: Scorched Earth
636.description: Frag Order and Saturation Charge Mines create Napalm zones upon exploding and Orbital Sanction creates one every 0.5s. Napalm zones deal 5 (+6% Bonus Physical Power) Physical Damage per 0.5s and last 3s.

661.name: Heavy Caliber
661.description: Basic Attack Timer is increased to 0.75s, but deal 310% damage and have 100 increased range. Magazine Size is decreased to 6.

736.name: Volcaic Slam
736.description: Scarlet's Enhanced Basic leaves behind a fiery rupture in a line that erupt after 0.45s. Eruption deals 20 (+60% ) Damage and Slows Enemies by 60% for 1s.

737.name: Cascade
737.description: Brine now applies on-hits at 100% effectiveness and damaging Enemy Targets with abilities grants 12% Bonus Attack Speed for 4s, once per ability, stacking up to 4 times.

738.name: The Gloom
738.description: Bubble radius grows up to 25% larger over 3s. Additionally Ikra and Allied Heroes become camouflaged when within a Bubble’s Radius.

739.name: Undertow
739.description: Enemy Heroes Suspended by Narcosis slowly travel towards Ikra and the cooldown is decreased by 2s when damaging an Enemy Hero.
